name: outlook-personal-mcp
description: MCP server for a personal Outlook.com mailbox and calendar via Microsoft Graph. Read, send, and organize mail; manage drafts with attachments; create, update, and respond to calendar events; check free/busy availability. Uses per-user device-code OAuth — credentials never leave your machine.

client_id.title: Azure App Client ID
client_id.description: Your Azure App Registration's Application (client) ID. Create a free app at https://portal.azure.com — see README for the three-minute setup.

file_root.title: File Access Root
file_root.description: Only files under this directory can be read by add_attachment or written by download_attachment.

max_file_bytes.title: Maximum File Bytes
max_file_bytes.description: Maximum bytes allowed for local attachment reads and attachment downloads.

allow_permanent_delete.title: Allow Permanent Delete
allow_permanent_delete.description: Enable the permanent_delete tool, which irreversibly removes messages (bypasses Deleted Items). Disabled by default for safety.

tools.name: whoami
tools.description: Return the signed-in user's Microsoft account profile

tools.name: list_messages
tools.description: List messages (newest first); optionally filter by folder or unread-only

tools.name: search_messages
tools.description: Full-text search across the entire mailbox

tools.name: get_message
tools.description: Get a single message; optionally include the full body

tools.name: list_attachments
tools.description: List a message's attachments (id, name, size, content type)

tools.name: download_attachment
tools.description: Download an attachment to a local file path you specify

tools.name: send_mail
tools.description: Send an email

tools.name: reply
tools.description: Reply to a message (reply_all to reply to everyone)

tools.name: forward
tools.description: Forward a message to recipients with an optional comment

tools.name: move_message
tools.description: Move a message to another folder

tools.name: copy_message
tools.description: Copy a message to another folder

tools.name: mark_read
tools.description: Mark a message read or unread

tools.name: flag_message
tools.description: Flag or unflag a message

tools.name: delete_message
tools.description: Delete a message (moves it to Deleted Items; reversible)

tools.name: permanent_delete
tools.description: Permanently delete a message (irreversible). Only available when OUTLOOK_MCP_ALLOW_PERMANENT_DELETE=true

tools.name: list_folders
tools.description: List mail folders with unread and total message counts

tools.name: create_folder
tools.description: Create a mail folder, optionally nested under a parent

tools.name: rename_folder
tools.description: Rename a mail folder

tools.name: delete_folder
tools.description: Delete a mail folder (moves it to Deleted Items)

tools.name: create_draft
tools.description: Create a draft message (not sent)

tools.name: update_draft
tools.description: Update a draft's subject and/or body

tools.name: add_attachment
tools.description: Attach a local file to a draft

tools.name: send_draft
tools.description: Send an existing draft

tools.name: list_calendars
tools.description: List the user's calendars

tools.name: list_events
tools.description: List events; if start/end (ISO 8601) are given, returns that time window

tools.name: search_events
tools.description: Search events by free text

tools.name: get_event
tools.description: Get one event including body, attendees, and online meeting link

tools.name: create_event
tools.description: Create a calendar event with optional attendees and online meeting

tools.name: update_event
tools.description: Update fields on an existing event (only provided fields change)

tools.name: delete_event
tools.description: Delete/cancel a calendar event

tools.name: respond_event
tools.description: Respond to a meeting invite: accept, decline, or tentative

tools.name: find_availability
tools.description: Get free/busy availability for a list of people over a time window
